data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the functionality of local guide assignment. While the linked use case mentions that a guide is assigned, there is no specific evidence demonstrating how this assignment is managed or validated through the API. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement for local guide assignment.
gaps: No evidence confirming the functionality of local guide assignment through API reads or persisted state checks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the local guide assignment functionality.
